Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2400 "FIRETRACK-1000-2400" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Fire Track.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following changes were made to allow the loading screen to be displayed: 1. Added an input handling routine at $0810 which checks for any keyboard or joystick fire button input 2. Changed the JMP $131D at $133C to jump to the input handling routine at $0810 instead so that any key can exit the loading screen 3. Copied the original init routine found at $02A7 to $0880 which is called when any key is pressed 4. This routine also resets the sprite priority register ($D01B) to $00 to ensure sprites are correctly shown in front of the bitmap when the game starts 5. It then jumps to the entry point at $2400
